headline: Netflix Tests New Ways To Keep Subscribers Engaged Beyond Streaming
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) has launched Netflix Playground, a standalone kids gaming app built around the company’s own characters and stories. Families using Netflix may see the service in a new light as the company ramps up live sports streaming distribution through its collaboration with EverPass Media. Netflix is expanding into real world culinary experiences via a new Chef’s Table partnership with American Express and Resy. Netflix has grown from a streaming video platform into a broader...
